properties.name: jp.ecuacion.splib.mail.title-prefix
properties.description: Prefix prepended to the email subject (e.g., environment label).

properties.name: jp.ecuacion.splib.mail.address-csv-on-system-error
properties.description: Comma-separated list of addresses to notify on system error.

properties.name: jp.ecuacion.splib.mail.smtp.checks-certificate
properties.description: Whether to verify the TLS certificate of the SMTP server.

properties.name: jp.ecuacion.splib.mail.debug
properties.description: Whether to enable JavaMail debug output.
